segments.text: Behold, I will send My messenger, who will prepare the way before Me.[^7] Then the Lord whom you seek will suddenly come to His temple—the Messenger of the covenant, in whom you delight—see, He is coming,
segments.speaker: the Lord of Hosts

segments.text: says the LORD of Hosts.
But who can endure the day of His coming? And who can st and when He appears? For He will be like a refiner’s fire, like a launderer’s soap.
And He will sit as a refiner and purifier of silver; He will purify the sons of Levi and refine them like gold and silver. Then they will present offerings to the LORD in righteousness.
Then the offerings of Judah and Jerusalem will please the LORD, as in days of old and years gone by.

Then I will draw near to you for judgment. And I will be a swift witness against sorcerers and adulterers and perjurers, against oppressors of the widowed and fatherless, and against those who defraud laborers of their wages and deny justice to the foreigner but do not fear Me,
segments.speaker: the Lord of Hosts

segments.text: says the LORD of Hosts.
Because I, the LORD, do not change, you descendants of Jacob have not been destroyed.
segments.speaker: the Lord of Hosts

segments.text: Yet from the days of your fathers, you have turned away from My statutes and have not kept them. Return to Me, and I will return to you,
segments.speaker: the Lord of Hosts

segments.text: says the LORD of Hosts.
But you ask, ‘How can we return?’
segments.speaker: the Lord of Hosts

segments.text:
Will a man rob God? Yet you are robbing Me!
But you ask, ‘How do we rob You?’
In tithes and offerings.
segments.speaker: the Lord of Hosts

segments.text: You are cursed with a curse, yet you—the whole nation—are still robbing Me.
segments.speaker: the Lord of Hosts

segments.text: Bring the full tithe into the storehouse, so that there may be food in My house. Test Me in this,
segments.speaker: the Lord of Hosts

segments.text: says the LORD of Hosts.
See if I will not open the windows of heaven and pour out for you blessing without measure.[^8]
segments.speaker: the Lord of Hosts

segments.text: I will rebuke the devourer[^9] for you, so that it will not destroy the fruits of your land, and the vine in your field will not fail to produce fruit,
segments.speaker: the Lord of Hosts

segments.text: says the LORD of Hosts.
Then all the nations will call you blessed, for you will be a land of delight,
segments.speaker: the Lord of Hosts

segments.text: says the LORD of Hosts.
Your words against Me have been harsh,
segments.speaker: the Lord

segments.text: says the LORD.
Yet you ask, ‘What have we spoken against You?’
segments.speaker: the Lord

segments.text: You have said, ‘It is futile to serve God. What have we gained by keeping His requirements and walking mournfully before the LORD of Hosts?
segments.speaker: the Lord

segments.text: So now we call the arrogant blessed. Not only do evildoers prosper, they even test God and escape.’
segments.speaker: the Lord

segments.text: At that time those who feared the LORD spoke with one another, and the LORD listened and heard them. So a scroll of remembrance was written before Him regarding those who feared the LORD and honored His name.
They will be Mine,
segments.speaker: the Lord of Hosts

segments.text: says the LORD of Hosts,
on the day when I prepare My treasured possession. And I will spare them as a man spares his own son who serves him.
segments.speaker: the Lord of Hosts

segments.text: So you will again distinguish between the righteous and the wicked, between those who serve God and those who do not.
segments.speaker: the Lord of Hosts
